Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ASX wobbles as oil stocks and gold miners fall, Wall Street slips
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket opened higher but erased its gains within the first half hour of trading as investors await progress on further peace talks between the US and Iran.

news.title: ASX stalls as investors eye Iran tensions
news.snippet: Australian shares closed flat as investors held back ahead of a Middle East ceasefire deadline, with energy stocks falling and banks delivered mixed results.

news.title: Fortescue launches ad campaign against billion-dollar diesel tax ‘handouts’ to miners
news.snippet: Fortescue is pushing for reform of the country’s diesel tax credits, which it says are an unnecessary “handout” to the mining industry worth billions of dollars.

news.title: ‘Nothing more than a tax hike’: Harsh budget call as Chalmers urged to raise GST, cut income taxes
news.snippet: A top economist has delivered a harsh verdict on Jim Chalmers’ budget plans as the Treasurer plots a crackdown on “intergenerational unfairness”.

news.title: ‘Theft’: Brutal swipe as debt nears $1 trillion
news.snippet: The Coalition has taken an unconventional approach in its latest attack on Labor’s management of the Australian economy.

news.title: ‘Forever’: Massive claim about gas tax
news.snippet: A 25 per cent tax on Australia’s gas exports could fund free public transport in the country “forever”, a former leader has claimed.

news.title: ASX flat despite Middle East crisis, oil price jump
news.snippet: Australian shares barely moved despite oil prices surging 8 per cent, as US-Iran tensions escalated from the seizure of an Iranian vessel.

news.title: Mining giant hits out at diesel tax credits
news.snippet: A television advertisement from Fortescue's campaign for reform of the diesel tax credits system.

news.title: Trump is an absolute disaster for the oil and gas industry
news.snippet: The US president has done more than anyone to accelerate the world’s green revolution and pull forward the irreversible collapse of fossil fuels.

news.title: Are we being cheated on prices? ACCC and supermarkets slug it out in court
news.snippet: For the consumer watchdog, this court battle is about more than the prices of Tim Tams, Coke and dog food. It goes to the heart of the grocery giants’ pricing and marketing methods.

news.title: Aurum rigs roar as thick high-grade gold hits stack up in West Africa
news.snippet: Aurum Resources has struck thick gold at Boundiali, extending BDT2 mineralisation beyond its resource as drilling ramps up ahead of key feasibility studies.

news.title: Giant's debut and a taunted Aussie in spotlight as NBA playoffs begin
